name: sweet violet
interactions: May increase sedation when combined with CNS depressants.
safetyNotes: Caution: safety evidence is limited or inconsistent. Avoid combining with sedatives, alcohol, or other CNS depressants.

sources.title: PubMed search: sweet violet
sources.note: Literature index for pharmacology and safety evidence
